artifacts.summary: Research report: validates the pre-existing handoff brief against live files, inventories the ~16 Task-NN comment markers into 11 rationale clusters, recommends a querymap/folders-exclude Nix generator for de-duplication, and works through all five holistic-reconsideration decision points (folders-exclude vs whitelist vs maildir-account-path, text/plain vs text/html default, Enter-binding trade-off, logos check-mail) with man-page- and prior-task-grounded recommendations -- all preserving current behavior. Establishes a rendered-config (aerc.conf/binds.conf/accounts.conf/querymap-*) byte-diff verification approach against a confirmed-green home-manager build baseline.

next_steps: Run /plan 115 to create an implementation plan consolidating the 11 rationale clusters, de-duplicating querymap-gmail/querymap-logos and the folders-exclude line via a Nix generator, and recording each of the five reconsideration decisions explicitly -- all behavior-preserving per this report's recommendations.
